build_system.build_command: mkdir -p build && cd build && cmake -C ../cmake/presets/most.cmake -C ../cmake/presets/nolib.cmake -D PKG_GPU=off ../cmake && cmake --build . -j4

configuration_parameters.description: Data file loaded by read_data before replication.
configuration_parameters.name: data_file

configuration_parameters.description: Simulation unit style from the staged benchmark scripts.
configuration_parameters.name: units

configuration_parameters.description: Atom style used by the benchmark scripts.
configuration_parameters.name: atom_style

configuration_parameters.description: TIP4P pair style and arguments. The staged scripts set O type, H type, bond type, angle type, qdist, and the LJ/Coulomb cutoff.
configuration_parameters.name: pair_style

configuration_parameters.description: Long-range solver required by the TIP4P long-range workload.
configuration_parameters.name: kspace_style

configuration_parameters.description: Neighbor style and skin distance. In Neighbor::set(), this maps to style=BIN and skin=2.0.
configuration_parameters.name: neighbor_command

configuration_parameters.description: Replication factors applied after read_data. The base file contains 216 waters (648 atoms); the staged workload replicates 4x4x4 to 41,472 atoms.
configuration_parameters.name: replicate

configuration_parameters.description: Deterministic seed used by velocity create.
configuration_parameters.name: velocity_seed

configuration_parameters.description: Integration timestep from the staged scripts.
configuration_parameters.name: timestep

configuration_parameters.description: Total run length encoded by the script.
configuration_parameters.name: run_steps

configuration_parameters.description: Thermo fields emitted every 100 steps in the staged scripts.
configuration_parameters.example: custom step atoms temp etotal pe ke press density
configuration_parameters.name: thermo_style

configuration_parameters.description: MPI rank count supplied by the launcher; benchmark cases vary this across 16, 32, and 64.
configuration_parameters.name: mpi_ranks

configuration_parameters.description: OpenMP threads per rank. The goal specifies keeping this fixed at 1.
configuration_parameters.name: omp_threads

entry_points.description: MPI front-end executable. Calls MPI_Init(), constructs a LAMMPS instance, parses command-line switches including -in/-i, and dispatches the input script through Input::file().
entry_points.name: lmp

entry_points.description: Opens a LAMMPS input script and executes it command by command. This is the path used both by the CLI and by unit tests that load scripted TIP4P fixtures.
entry_points.name: Input::file

entry_points.description: Main NVE timestep loop. Calls neighbor->decide() every step, performs exchange/borders when reneighboring is needed, calls neighbor->build(1), then computes pair, bonded, and KSpace forces.
entry_points.name: Verlet::run

entry_points.description: Reneighbor decision point. Applies every/delay/build_once policy and, with default check=yes semantics, triggers a rebuild when any owned atom has moved more than half the skin distance since the last build.
entry_points.name: Neighbor::decide

entry_points.description: Perpetual neighbor rebuild hot path. Resets ago, stores reference coordinates for distance checking, bins all local and ghost atoms, rebuilds all perpetual pair lists, and rebuilds topology lists when topoflag=1.
entry_points.name: Neighbor::build

entry_points.description: Binned pair-list construction kernel. For this workload, Neighbor::choose_pair() resolves the base CPU path to the molecular half/bin/newton orthogonal implementation, which iterates owned atoms over bin stencils, applies exclusions and special-neighbor encoding, and fills NeighList pages.
entry_points.name: NPairBin::build

immutable_paths: src/** except src/neighbor.cpp, src/neighbor.h, src/npair_bin.cpp, src/npair_bin.h

output_quantities.description: Total energy from thermo output; primary NVE drift check across matched output steps.
Per-atom force components for representative frames; compare RMS component deltas against baseline.
Maximum absolute force-component deviation over representative frames.
Reported by finish.cpp as 'Neighbor list builds'; useful to confirm rebuild cadence has not changed unexpectedly.
Reported by finish.cpp as 'Dangerous builds'; should remain zero for safe operation on these cases.

suggested_cases.description: Primary long-run training case on fewer ranks; repeated rebuilds with lower communication noise.
Primary long-run training case on a second decomposition.
Shorter-turnaround training case with the same physics and neighbor settings.
Held-out scaling-sensitive case where neighbor and communication interact more strongly.

threading_model.description: Primary parallelism is MPI domain decomposition. src/main.cpp calls MPI_Init() and the lmp executable runs one LAMMPS instance over an MPI communicator. The editable hot path in src/neighbor.cpp and src/npair_bin.cpp is the base CPU per-rank neighbor code, not a threaded kernel. OpenMP support may be compiled if available, and OPENMP/Kokkos variants exist elsewhere, but the staged scripts use non-suffixed styles and the goal explicitly fixes OMP_NUM_THREADS=1; PKG_GPU is disabled in the provided build.
